features: ORTHODOX CHURCH CANDLES. Every single taper candle out of 50 pcs set meets the highest candle quality standards. With the 30 min burning time, these 15 cm long and 5 mm thick beeswax candles will enhance your meditation, prayer, or religious ritual, and add to your home altar.

NATURAL BEESWAX CANDLES. When choosing tapeWhite candles for meditation, romantic occasions or rituals, be sure to always look for Beeswax Candles. Danilovo thin candle tapers with cotton wick are made from the non-toxic beeswax.

MINDFUL CANDLES FOR MINDFUL MOMENTS. Lead-free beeswax composition allows these taper candles to burn stunningly cleaner and more evenly than any paraffin candle. Unlike stuffy air from burning paraffin, palm, or soy wax, beeswax candles do not produce soot or drips.

NATURAL HONEY SMELL FOR A PLEASANT EXPERIENCE. Even without any fragrances added, our ritual candles infuse the room with gentle honey scent that helps to create a special atmosphere or a romantic mood, and can give you a truly divine, spiritual experience.

CRAFT YOUR CANDLE. Each beeswax candle can be easily twisted to create unique candle compositions for special events such as Christmas or make crafts with your kids. Keep candles cool and dry, away from sunlight; shape and colour can change with use.
